{{CargoRelic
|name=Marseilles Statue
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=10-22
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.2%), Hellas Treasure Map (20%)
|description=On Oct 22, 1826, Francois Rude carved La Marseillaise on the Arc de Triomphe in Paris. The Marseillaise soldier statue is often used as a template in art lessons. It features the young bearded soldier with a strong and intense facial expression. He raised the helmet in his right hand and turned to the left shouting to the audience. Such battle spirit and enthusiasm can easily leave a deep impression on the audience. With a vivid and energetic body expression with a neat and strong structure, it was known to be the symbol and pride of France.
|fame=21
|art=46
|fth=28
|civ=30
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Demon Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +3 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|hellas|def|20}}
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Blue ART Relics]]
[[Category:Demon Minion HARD Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
